title: Cross-lingual Causal Commonsense Reasoning (XCOPA)
description: Select the most plausible cause or effect for a given premise, testing causal commonsense reasoning across languages. Based on XCOPA (Ponti et al., EMNLP 2020). Annotators choose between two alternatives, rate their confidence, and assess the reasoning difficulty.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)",
    month = nov,
    year = "2020",
    address = "Online",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2020.emnlp-main.185",
    pages = "2362--2376"
